name: ai-startup-compliance-review
description: AI startup compliance review skill for product launch, data processing, financing diligence, cross-border, and vendor contract risk workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Structured compliance review for AI startups with optional Pkulaw MCP retrieval.
interface.longDescription: Provides a source-tagged workflow for AI startup compliance review across product launch, data processing, financing diligence, cross-border deployment, and AI vendor contract scenarios, using local corpus materials first and 北大法宝 MCP when configured.
defaultPrompt: Review this AI startup launch for compliance risk using local sources first and Pkulaw MCP when configured.
Assess training data and model IP risk with sourced remediation steps.
Review this AI vendor contract and identify legal verification gaps.
